SPLMTL_OPRTG_AUTHRTY 
LABEL: 
Annual Managed Care Plan Record in Supplemental Operating Authority File 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there are one or more record(s) in the Operating Authority supplemental file for 
this managed care plan/entity (i.e., CCW_APL_LINK_KEY).
